home.headline: Holt Family Office
home.intro_lead: As an independent family office, we unite cross-generational thinking with entrepreneurial foresight.
home.intro_p: At the heart of our work lies the responsible stewardship of entrusted value — discreet, enduring and held to the highest standard.
home.gateway_about_p: Structuring and administration of wealth — defined by continuity, confidentiality and a clear commitment to lasting values.
home.gateway_philosophy_p: Permanence is not built overnight. This conviction shapes every decision we make.

about.title: A dependable partner.
about.lead: We see ourselves as a dependable partner for the structuring and administration of wealth.
about.p1: Our work is defined by continuity, confidentiality and a clear commitment to lasting values.
about.p2: We move with assurance through an environment that demands experience, network and discretion in equal measure.

activities.title: Values that endure.
activities.lead: Our activities encompass the administration of our own assets as well as selected engagements in the field of exclusive tangible assets.
activities.p1: With an instinct for quality and permanence, we devote ourselves to values that retain their meaning across generations — from exceptional craftsmanship to art in all its forms.

philosophy.title: In generations, not in quarters.
philosophy.p1: We think in generations, not in quarters.
philosophy.p2: This conviction shapes every decision we make and forms the foundation of a trust proven over many years.

contact.title: By confidential conversation.
contact.p1: Every relationship begins with a confidential conversation.
